records.ety: [OE. beor, ber, AS. ber; akin to Fries. biar, Icel. bjrr, OHG. bior, D. & G. bier, and possibly E. brew. √93, See Brew.]

defs: A fermented liquor made from any malted grain, but commonly from barley malt, with hops or some other substance to impart a bitter flavor.
notes: ☞ Beer has different names, as small beer, ale, porter, brown stout, lager beer, according to its strength, or other qualities. See Ale.

defs: A fermented extract of the roots and other parts of various plants, as spruce, ginger, sassafras, etc.
